recommendations.title: Alaska
recommendations.overview: Nadine is a French young woman. Fausto is an Italian young man trying to make it in Paris as a restaurant waiter. They accidentally meet at a five-star hotel. Both are fragile, alone and obsessed with the idea of an unattainable happiness. Their inte

recommendations.title: Land Of The Sons
recommendations.overview: Civilisation is coming to an end. The death of his only relative gives a feral boy the pretext to journey beyond the confines of his home environment; only by doing this will he be able to decipher his father's journal, the most valuable artefact in

recommendations.title: Lessons in Chocolate
recommendations.overview: Mattia, a building contractor on a promising career path, is about to close the biggest deal of his professional life, when his illegally-hired worker Kamal falls off some scaffolding, suffers a severe break and threatens to sue and press charges aga

recommendations.title: Game of Death
recommendations.overview: A martial arts movie star must fake his death to find the people who are trying to kill him.

recommendations.title: Frailty
recommendations.overview: A mysterious man arrives at the offices of an FBI agent and recounts his childhood: how his religious fanatic father received visions telling him to kill people who were in fact "demons."

recommendations.title: Citizen X
recommendations.overview: Based on the true story of a Russian serial killer who, over many years, claimed victim to over 50 people. His victims were mostly under the age of 17. In what was then a communists state, the police investigations were hampered by bureaucracy, incom

recommendations.title: The Pig, the Snake and the Pigeon
recommendations.overview: The arrogant, third most-wanted criminal in Taiwan, decides to get rid of the top two competitors and crowns himself the most-wanted criminal before dying.

recommendations.title: Ring 0
recommendations.overview: Taking place thirty years before the events of Ringu, Ringu 0 provides the shocking background story of how the girl on the video became a deadly, vengeful spirit.

recommendations.title: Tower of Terror
recommendations.overview: A disgraced reporter investigates an abandoned luxury hotel where five people mysteriously disappeared sixty years earlier.

recommendations.title: Cloudy Mountain
recommendations.overview: The opening of the new tunnel, which took ten years to build, coincided with a series of serious cataclysms. The lives of 160,000 people depend on the actions of two people, a father and a son.
